task_completion.description: Verify the agent starred the penetration test report message in #security-alerts and replied in a thread to confirm mobilization.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the #security-alerts channel, the target message has a star icon indicating it is starred, and there is a thread reply visible from the 'admin' user confirming mobilization.

task_completion.description: Verify the creation of a private channel named 'sec-remediation-2026-03-06' with the specific topic containing the CVEs and deadline.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The left sidebar shows a private channel (lock icon) named 'sec-remediation-2026-03-06'. The channel header or info panel displays the topic 'Critical | CVE-2026-0142, CVE-2026-0198, CVE-2026-0215 | Remediation deadline: 2026-03-13'.

task_completion.description: Verify that ciso, security.analyst, vendor.liaison, compliance.officer, and devops.lead were invited to the new remediation channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: System messages in the 'sec-remediation-2026-03-06' channel showing that the admin added these specific users, or the channel members list includes them.

task_completion.description: Verify a vulnerability triage matrix for the CVEs is posted and pinned, and a status update on containment/vendor contact is posted in the remediation channel.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In 'sec-remediation-2026-03-06', there is a message containing a triage matrix for the 3 CVEs with a 'pinned' indicator (pin icon/system message), and another message from admin providing a status update on containment and vendor contact.

task_completion.description: Verify a direct message was sent to compliance.officer regarding PCI-DSS notification requirements.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The left sidebar shows a DM with 'compliance.officer' and the chat history shows a message from admin discussing PCI-DSS notification requirements.

task_completion.description: Verify a direct message was sent to vendor.liaison regarding PayStream and IdentityBridge patch availability.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The left sidebar shows a DM with 'vendor.liaison' and the chat history shows a message from admin asking about patch availability for PayStream and IdentityBridge.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the Rocket.Chat web interface or desktop client rather than using curl/API scripts in a terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Rocket.Chat graphical user interface with the agent clicking, typing, and navigating through the UI, not a terminal window executing API commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually typed out the messages and channel configurations rather than just pasting the exact prompt text without formatting.
integrity.visual_evidence: The messages sent by the agent should be contextually appropriate (e.g., actual conversational text for DMs and thread replies) rather than just a raw copy-paste of the task description's instructions.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is using a web browser or Rocket.Chat client, not a text editor mocking the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: Presence of browser UI elements (address bar, tabs) or the Rocket.Chat application window frame, along with standard Rocket.Chat UI components (sidebar, message input box, channel header).

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected remediation channel is 'sec-remediation-2026-03-06'. The required members to be invited are 'ciso', 'security.analyst', 'vendor.liaison', 'compliance.officer', and 'devops.lead'. The agent must send direct messages to 'compliance.officer' and 'vendor.liaison'. The target vulnerabilities are 'CVE-2026-0142', 'CVE-2026-0198', and 'CVE-2026-0215'.
